description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut pants, complemented by sturdy shoes. He wears a baseball cap and large gloves that extend past the wrists, suggesting readiness for manual or outdoor work. The figure's build is athletic, with broad shoulders and a straight posture, arms extended horizontally. The face is clean-shaven and the head is fully covered by the cap. The overall appearance is practical and utilitarian, suitable for urban or worksite environments.
description: An adult male in a t-shirt, pants, gloves, and a baseball cap, standing with arms outstretched. The attire and accessories suggest a practical, work-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, gloves, and cap clearly, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, nose, and the full length of the arm and glove.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cap, shirt, pants, and gloves, with the figure's back and legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, cap, and the right arm and glove in full extension.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt, straight-cut pants, baseball cap, and work gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
